title: DOV vs. IEX: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?
text: Investors looking for stocks in the Manufacturing - General Industrial sector might want to consider either Dover Corporation (DOV) or Idex (IEX). But which of these two stocks is more attractive to value investors?

title: IDEX Corporation to Webcast Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Call
text: NORTHBROOK, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--IDEX Corporation (NYSE:IEX) announced today that it has scheduled the broadcast of the company's second quarter earnings conference call over the internet on Thursday, July 27, 2023 at 9:30 a.m. CT. Chief Executive Officer and President Eric Ashleman and Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer William Grogan will discuss the company's second quarter financial performance, and respond to questions from the financial community. IDEX invites interested.

title: IDEX Corporation Declare Regular Quarterly Cash Dividend
text: NORTHBROOK, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--IDEX CORPORATION (NYSE:IEX) today announced that its Board of Directors has approved a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.64 per common share. This dividend will be paid July 28, 2023 to shareholders of record as of July 14, 2023. This dividend represents the company's 115th consecutive regular quarterly cash dividend payment. About IDEX IDEX Corporation (NYSE: IEX) makes thousands of products and mission-critical components that improve everyday life all a.

title: IDEX: A Wealth Compounder You Probably Don't Know
text: IDEX Corporation is a high-quality compounder in the industrial sector with a strong dividend track record and consistent growth. The company's capital deployment priorities include organic growth, targeted M&A, dividend payouts, and opportunistic share buybacks. Although the current valuation is fair, investors may consider an entry point closer to $180 to balance long-term potential with potential market risks.

title: IDEX Corporation: Dealmaking Machine At Work
text: IDEX Corporation has seen continued operating momentum. The company continues its practice of combining organic growth with bolt-on dealmaking. I like the positioning and track record of the IDEX Corporation business, as much is to like, except for a still demanding valuation.

title: 9 Upcoming Dividend Increases
text: All these stocks have at least five fiscal years of dividend growth history and come from the U.S. Dividend Champions List. They have an average increase of 6.7% and a median increase of 7.1%. There are nine increases for next week, down from eleven last week.

title: 5 Stocks to Watch on Dividend Hikes Amid Economic Turmoil
text: Investors may keep a tab on stocks like LOW, NTES, CM, HLNE and IEX, which have lately hiked their dividend payments.
